info.title: Module 1: Intake Gateway API
info.description: API Gateway converting Natural Language to Strict Agentic Scraping JSON structures.

post.summary: Process unstructured prompt into structured Module 2 Payload
post.description: Submit a conversational prompt describing your scraping targets.

content.example: Scrape flights from delhi to detroit on airindia.com

200.description: Successful extraction. Returns either a clarifying_question or a full INPUT_CONTRACT_VALIDATED JSON schema.
